title: LOW: host-meta domain not XML-escaped in discovery.rs
description: In src/discovery.rs lines 165-173, the host_meta() handler interpolates state.config.server.domain directly into an XML template string without calling xml_escape(). The domain comes from the config file and is admin-controlled, so this is not exploitable in practice. However, feeds.rs correctly XML-escapes all dynamic values including the domain. For consistency and defense-in-depth, the domain in host-meta should also be XML-escaped. File: /home/mark/PROJECT/smallhold/src/discovery.rs lines 165-173.
close_reason: Fixed: host-meta handler now XML-escapes the domain value.
